title: Rhodostemonodaphne licanioides
taxonomy: Rhodostemonodaphne licanioides is a plant species classified within the family Lauraceae. This family includes various other plants, such as laurels and avocados. The genus Rhodostemonodaphne is a part of this family and comprises several species found in tropical regions. Rhodostemonodaphne licanioides, specifically, is native to the tropical forests of the Atlantic coast of Africa. Its classification is further supported by the APG III system, which categorizes it based on molecular and morphological characteristics.
